title: Establish app-independent Cabinet catalog core
goal: Introduce the non-destructive target role, catalog contract, validator, renderer and full migration matrix inside the existing Cabinet repository before removing legacy surfaces.

approval.note: The reviewed and merged migration plan authorizes only the non-destructive catalog-core slice. Checkout and execution must remain bound to this task and repository.

acceptance.assertion: README, agent entry and a machine-readable policy define Cabinet as a system catalog for systems, purposes, truth owners, stable relations and entrypoints only.
A minimal machine-readable catalog contract and sample catalog are present and validated.
A deterministic readable catalog projection is generated from catalog data.
Every active Cabinet surface is classified as keep, simplify, move, archive or remove with target organ and dependency.
This slice does not stop services, delete app data, rename the repository or remove legacy content.

metadata.source_decision: Cabinet is to become an app-independent Heimgewebe system catalog.

scope: privacy remediation for tracked public evidence
